word: H5257 - נְסִיךְ - nᵉçîyk - nes-eek' - Drink offering

sections.paragraph:
Original: נסיך

Transliteration: nesı̂yk

Phonetic: nes-eek'

BDB Definition:

  1. poured out, libation, molten image, one anointed
    1. libation, drink-offering
    2. molten image
  2. prince, anointed one

Origin: from H5258

TWOT entry: 1375b,1377a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
